<!-- Thanks for contributing to super-engineer! -->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. New skill? Improvement? Fix? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Improvement to an existing skill
- [ ] Bug fix (broken command, dead link, typo)
- [ ] Docs / repo meta

## Checklist

- [ ] My skill folder is kebab-case and contains a `SKILL.md`.
- [ ] `SKILL.md` states a clear **trigger** and a one-paragraph **summary**.
- [ ] It includes **agent behavior rules** (what to do / never do).
- [ ] Code examples are correct and runnable.
- [ ] I added/updated the skill's row in the table in `README.md`.
- [ ] I removed the template placeholders and comments.
- [ ] I agree my contribution is licensed under the project's MIT License, and I have the right to contribute it.
